# Eddie Phung | Portfolio Identity
> Bridging Econometric Rigor with Agentic Automation.

## Overview
Eddie Phung (Cuong Phung Thai) is a Fintech Researcher, AI Automation Builder, and Co-Founder at nOps Labs. He specializes in building autonomous logic, quantitative research, and creative tech orchestrations.

## Core Specializations
- **System Design**: Agentic n8n planning with JSON-batching and complex API orchestration.
- **Fintech Builder**: Econometric research (Panel Data Regression), Tokenomics, and UEH-Awarded Fintech research.
- **Startup Growth & Ops**: Zero-to-one business development, lead-gen scoring, and GTM frameworking.
- **Creative Tech**: AI-UGC production pipelines and Virtual KOL persona design.

## Experience Highlights
- **nOps Labs**: Architected autonomous AI Video Engine scaling to 100-200 videos/day.
- **Bep Ink**: Built geo-targeted lead generation engine for FnB market in HCMC.
- **GFI Research**: Virtual KOL strategy, closing $5K Mantle deal.
- **JustFactor**: Addressing Vietnam's $24B SME credit gap with an Intelligent Origination PoC.
- **Academic**: 3rd Runner-up in ATTACKER 2024 Fintech Algo Trading.
